intent_head: Find the next birthday from the visible people. If several birthdays land on the same next date, list all matching names. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

details: Find the next birthday from the visible people. If several birthdays land on the same next date, list all matching names. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system before task work, used canonical cast records as authority for birthdays, and read the named entity file before citing the person.
function.outcome_justification: Using current date from context (2026-03-30), birthday search in canonical cast records showed upcoming dates; follow-up search for the earliest upcoming date (05-21) returned a single match, and reading /10_entities/cast/tobias.md confirmed the exact name Tobias Kern with birthday 1986-05-21.
